Appearances:
Plaintiff Hussein A. Saleh is present.
Attorney Marc Seidenfeld appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Maria Reyes Garcia present.
Attorney Kyle Bassman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Andy Westley, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of June 24, 2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
